meta.title: FreshMilk | Content products people visit every day
meta.description: FreshMilk develops content products centered on Storit, a webtoon fandom community. Based in Pohang · Handong University incubator.

hero.subtitle: We plan and develop mobile services in webtoon, K-content, and habit-forming learning. Our flagship service is Storit, a webtoon fandom community.

about.heading:
We create content experiences
people return to every day.
about.lead: FreshMilk is a content product company founded in Pohang in December 2025. We develop and operate mobile services with Storit as our flagship, alongside tolli and Picktory.
about.missionText: Blend technology and content trends to deliver joy and value to people.
about.storyP1: FreshMilk develops mobile services in webtoon, K-content, and habit-forming learning that users engage with daily.
about.storyP2: We improve services quickly based on market validation, with a focus on lasting value for users.
about.tenet3: User value at the center of product

projects.sectionLead: Products and services we operate and develop, centered on Storit.
projects.mainCopy: From reading webtoons to playing them. A community service where quizzes and rewards bring fans together.
projects.mainFeature1: Webtoon-based quizzes let fans participate directly
projects.mainFeature2: Rewards for answers and engagement keep the community active
projects.mainFeature3: Beta in 2026 — web and app in parallel
projects.p2Copy: A daily verse at your fingertips. A mobile service for Bible memorization, game-like.
projects.p3Copy: K-content through guessing. A service where prediction and reasoning bring fans together.
projects.econoupTeaser: econoup — five minutes of economics daily, habit-forming learning app (working title · in planning)

team.heading: Leadership
team.subheading: Leading product development and business operations together.
team.m1Bio: Leads product development and organization. Drives service launches and business with Storit at the center.
team.m2Bio: Leads service planning and business design. Reflects user feedback into product direction quickly.

updates.heading: News & updates
updates.u1Text: Company site refresh · Storit beta service in prep
updates.u2Text: tolli launched on iOS and Android

contact.heading: Business inquiries
contact.subtitle: We welcome inquiries about partnerships, collaboration, investment, media, and our services.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy · FreshMilk
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: FreshMilk ("the Company") values your privacy and complies with applicable laws.
privacy.s1Body: Our website can be viewed without registration. When you contact us by email, we may collect your name, contact details, email address, and message content that you provide voluntarily.
privacy.s2Body: We use collected information only to respond to inquiries, review partnerships, and provide service information as requested.
privacy.s3Body: We delete personal information without delay after inquiry handling is complete and any legally required retention period has passed.
privacy.s4Body: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact kgsan@freshmilk.kr.
